steps.title: Rate of change equals slope
steps.content: The rate of change of distance with respect to time is the slope of the equation $d$ versus $t$. For a linear relationship, the slope is simply the coefficient of $t$.

steps.title: Extract the slope and apply units
steps.content: In $d = 15t$, the coefficient of $t$ is 15. Since $d$ is in inches and $t$ is in seconds, the rate of change is 15 inches per second. That matches choice B — B is correct.
